overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character first observing a flying vehicle overhead from an industrial rooftop area, then walking through a futuristic urban environment beneath elevated highways. The sequence features digital billboards, satellite dishes, and dense cyberpunk architecture with warm afternoon lighting.

events.description: flying vehicle passes directly overhead casting shadow

agents.ego_description: standing still looking up at the aerial vehicle passing overhead

notable_agents.action: large flying vehicle cruising overhead from left to right

entered.detail: futuristic aerial vehicle with glowing thrusters flying overhead
large white satellite dishes mounted on industrial structure
tall cylindrical tower with illuminated CYBERPUNK signage
black metal safety railing along the rooftop edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking up at a clear blue sky as a large flying vehicle passes overhead. The setting is an industrial rooftop area with satellite dishes and a prominent tower bearing CYBERPUNK signage visible in the background. The camera remains stationary, tracking the vehicle's movement across the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: camera pans down from sky view to street level and begins moving forward
begins walking along the pedestrian walkway following the character ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with support pillars
illuminated advertising displays embedded in the walkway floor
wide concrete path with metal railings on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from skyward observation to street level, beginning to walk along a covered pedestrian walkway. Digital billboards line the left side of the path while the massive elevated highway structure dominates overhead. The industrial tower with CYBERPUNK signage remains visible but shifts to the left as the camera moves forward.

events.description: approaching crosswalk and waiting for pedestrians to clear
turning right to cross the street at the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic while crossing the intersection

notable_agents.action: man in white tank top walking past in the opposite direction

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
yellow construction scaffolding around industrial structures
traffic signal showing green for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an urban intersection beneath the elevated highway, where pedestrian density increases. The scene features a crosswalk with yellow stripes, industrial scaffolding on the right, and moderate foot traffic. The camera follows the character as they navigate through the crossing pedestrians and turn to continue along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a wide observation of the sky to a grounded walk through a dense, futuristic urban corridor. It begins by tracking a large flying vehicle as it glides across a clear blue sky above an industrial rooftop dotted with satellite dishes and a distant tower bearing CYBERPUNK signage. As the camera descends to street level, the perspective transitions into a forward walk along a covered pedestrian walkway, where digital billboards line the path beneath the oppressive weight of a massive elevated highway. The scene then opens into a bustling urban intersection, moving past industrial scaffolding and across a yellow-striped crosswalk. Finally, the camera navigates through a crowd of pedestrians, turning to continue deeper into the city's architectural maze.
